data.name: Hentai Clicker: Lexxa is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Lexxa is streaming

Step into a dark, seductive realm where temptation reigns supreme.
Lexxa, a mesmerizing succubus with glowing eyes and a devilish smile, is live—and she thrives on your attention. Every click feeds her power, deepens the infernal atmosphere, and draws you closer to her dangerous charm.

Sultry, playful, and irresistibly wicked, Lexxa teases with every movement, inviting you deeper into her shadowy world where desire and magic intertwine. 😈🔥

🩸 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Lexxa is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with a hellish, seductive fantasy.
Each tap strengthens Lexxa’s demonic energy, unlocking new outfits, animations, and reactions that intensify the atmosphere.

Collect hearts to reveal her infernal wardrobe, uncover mysterious scenes, and feel the heat rise as her presence grows more powerful. The deeper you go, the stronger the temptation becomes.

🎉 Features

🔥 Demonic Atmosphere – A dark, fiery aesthetic filled with infernal charm.
😈 Succubus Star – Playful, dangerous, and endlessly tempting.
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Simple to play, hard to resist.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From elegant infernal attire to daring demonic looks.
🔊 Voice & Reactions – Whispers, laughter, and teasing responses to every click.
🚀 Progression System – Stack hearts and unlock deeper layers of Lexxa’s power.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you’re drawn to dark fantasy, playful temptation, and a character who knows exactly how to pull you in, Lexxa is impossible to ignore.
She doesn’t chase—she lures. And once you’re close, there’s no turning back. 🔥

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Each click fuels her demonic energy.
🔓 Unlock Scenes & Outfits – Use hearts to reveal new looks and moments.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Accelerate progression and intensify the experience.

🎉 Enter the Infernal Temptation

She’s live.
She’s watching.
And she’s waiting for you to give in.

Dive into Hentai Clicker: Lexxa is streaming and let the succubus take control. 😈🔥

data.short_description: 😈 Enter the infernal allure of Hentai Clicker: Lexxa is streaming! Click to collect ❤️, unlock demonic outfits, and feel the seductive power of a playful succubus in a dark, addictive clicker experience. 🔥
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
